client_psychology: Clients want to look refreshed and natural — 'no one can tell but everyone notices.' They fear looking overdone or frozen. Trust in the injector is paramount — they research extensively before booking. Price transparency builds trust (many med spas hide pricing). Before/after photos are the #1 conversion tool. Membership/loyalty programs drive retention. Many clients start with one service and gradually add more as trust builds.
